---
title: "Contact"
description-meta: "Reach out to me with questions and comments"
title-block-banner: false
#comments:
# giscus: 
#   repo: gscollins1973/gscollins1973.github.io
---

<center>

**Gary Collins**

Department of Applied Health Sciences

University of Birmingham

Birmingham

United Kingdom

Email: [g.s.collins\@bham.ac.uk](mailto:g.s.collins@bham.ac.uk){.email}

</center>
